product_updates.title: Is this the dawn of the Tokenpocalypse?
product_updates.content: We're likely to see more price increases as the big AI companies plan to go public.

product_updates.title: Notion restores access to Anthropic after service disruption
product_updates.content: Notion's head of product said he was "astonished" at “the amount of people RT-ing this."

product_updates.title: OpenAI is still working on that ‘super app’
product_updates.content: "Chat is dead" — at least, according to a senior OpenAI employee.
